name: stock_chart
description: Stock candlestick chart (OHLCV, daily/intraday). Use for visualizing stock prices. Can show buy/sell points and moving averages. Required props: symbol (code) + data (OHLCV array). title is optional (the stock's display name if present, otherwise symbol is shown). Do NOT use a 'name' key — put the display name in 'title'.
semanticText: 주식 종목 시세 주가 캔들 일봉 분봉 차트 OHLCV 이동평균 MA 골든크로스 데드크로스 거래량 저항 지지 매수 매도 포인트 005930 삼성전자 코스피 코스닥 투자 분석

symbol.description: stock code. optional — if omitted, only title is used as the label.

title.description: stock display name — not the symbol code

data.description: OHLCV array — oldest → newest order. 10+ days recommended. If open/high/low/volume are missing, falls back to close (flat candle).

indicators.description: moving averages. default ["MA5","MA20"]. use [] if not needed.

date.description: candle date (must match a data date). With it, an ↑ buy arrow below that candle; without it, a horizontal line at the price level (support).

buyPoints.description: buy signals. With date, draws an ↑ arrow on that candle (buy timing); without date, a horizontal line at the price level (support). use [] if none.

date.description: candle date (must match a data date). With it, a ↓ sell arrow above that candle; without it, a horizontal line at the price level (resistance).

sellPoints.description: sell signals. With date, draws a ↓ arrow on that candle (sell timing); without date, a horizontal line at the price level (resistance). use [] if none.

name: chart
description:
General chart (bar/line/pie/doughnut). Visualize numeric comparison, trend, or distribution. For stock prices use stock_chart.
- chartType: trend / time-series (moving averages, price trend) = line / item comparison = bar / share = pie·doughnut.
- Single series → put a plain number array in data (number[]). Multiple series (MA 5·20·60, revenue / operating-profit / net-income, etc.) → series as [{name, data:[numbers]}]. ⚠️ Do NOT put series objects in data (they render as 0).
semanticText: 차트 그래프 막대 바 선 라인 원형 파이 도넛 시각화 비교 추이 분포 퍼센트 비율 통계 수치 데이터

data.description: Plain number array for a single series — number[] only. e.g. [100, 200, 300]. ⚠️ Do NOT put series objects like {name/label, data} here — multiple series must go in the series field. (Object arrays in data render as 0.)

series.description: Array of multiple series. Each item = {name, data: number[]} (label/values also accepted). e.g. [{name:'Revenue',data:[2792,3334,3471]},{name:'Operating profit',data:[425,585,591]}]. For time series (moving averages, price trend) use chartType='line'. Multiple metrics in one chart = must use series (not data).

name: table
description: Table — lay out and compare **multiple targets/records** (several stocks × several metrics, many rows) across rows and columns. Required when comparing 3+ numbers. For **a single target's attributes only**, key_value (single-target table) fits better — don't split multiple targets into key_value cards; use one table (targets = columns or rows). No markdown |---|. With many columns set stickyCol=true to pin the first column; with many rows set striped=true (zebra, readability) and stickyHeader=true to keep the header visible while scrolling. For long tables or mobile, set filterable=true (row search) and/or columnToggle=true (show only chosen columns). Set sortable=true ONLY when sorting is meaningful (many rows + comparable columns like price/count/ranking) — not for small or fixed-order tables.
semanticText: table grid rows columns headers list compare spreadsheet data ranking metrics revenue multiple stocks 표 테이블 행 열 헤더 나열 비교 정리 데이터 목록 항목 필드 매출 지표 순위 여러 종목 비교

rows.description: row data (each row is an array of strings)

stickyCol.description: true pins the first column. default false.

striped.description: true shades even rows slightly (zebra). default false.

stickyHeader.description: true keeps the header row sticky (header stays visible while scrolling a long table). default false.

filterable.description: true shows a row-search box above the table — only rows containing the typed text (matched across all cells, case-insensitive). Good for long tables / mobile to narrow to the rows you want. default false.

columnToggle.description: true shows column chips above the table — tap to show only the columns you want (narrow a wide table on mobile). Recommended for many-column tables. default false.

sortable.description: true makes column headers click-to-sort (asc → desc → original). Opt-in — set ONLY when sorting is meaningful: many rows + comparable columns (prices, counts, ranking, dates). Do NOT set for small tables, single-target attribute tables, or where row order itself is the meaning. default false.

name: badge
description: Small tag/badge. Shows a status, category, or label.
semanticText: 뱃지 배지 태그 레이블 라벨 상태 카테고리 표시 마크 chip pill

color.description: Color/status. A color name (blue/red/green/yellow/purple/gray/orange) or a semantic value (success/warning/error/danger/info/neutral). Defaults to blue.

name: callout
description: Info highlight box — for tips, cautions, or notes within the body. Types: info/success/warning/error/tip/accent/highlight/neutral (reuses AlertComp).
semanticText: 콜아웃 callout 정보 강조 박스 알림 팁 참고 주의 info success warning error

type.description: Callout type. info (blue, default) / success (green) / warning (orange) / error (red) / tip (purple·💡) / accent (orange·🔥) / highlight (yellow·⭐) / neutral (gray·📎)

action.description: CTA button — when { label, href } is set, shows a button below the body

name: progress
description: Progress bar. Shows 0–100%. Task completion, loading, budget usage, etc.
semanticText: 프로그래스 진행률 진행도 완료율 퍼센트 비율 로딩 바 progress bar 달성률

name: header
description: Section heading (h1–h6). A structural title.
semanticText: 제목 헤더 타이틀 섹션 h1 h2 h3 h4 h5 h6 구분 heading title 챕터

name: text
description: Body text block. Only when explicit structure is needed; for a normal answer just reply with text.
semanticText: 텍스트 본문 문단 paragraph 내용 글 설명 description

name: list
description: List (3+ items recommended). Ordered (numbered) or bulleted.
semanticText: 리스트 목록 항목 나열 bullet ordered unordered 번호 1 2 3 체크 체크리스트 todo

name: divider
description: Section divider.
semanticText: 구분선 경계선 divider hr 수평선 separator 분리

name: countdown
description: Countdown timer to a specific time.
semanticText: 카운트다운 타이머 시간 제한 남은시간 디데이 D-DAY deadline 마감 timer

name: image
description: Image. src URL and alt are required.
semanticText: 이미지 그림 사진 picture photo img 썸네일 thumbnail

name: card
description: Card. Simple case: set title + content (body text, **bold** supported) directly. Complex layout: place components in children (can mix with title/content). image = top hero image, footer = bottom meta text, link = whole-card click.
semanticText: 카드 card 블록 박스 그룹 container wrapper 요약 summary 프리뷰 썸네일 이미지 hero 제목 내용 본문

content.description: card body text (optional). Inline markdown like **bold** supported. Line breaks preserved.

text.description: alias for content (optional). Used as the body when content is absent.

description.description: alias for content (optional). Used as the body text.

body.description: alias for content (optional). Used as the body text.

badge.description: tag chip at the top of the card (optional). Category/status label.

image.description: top hero image of the card (optional).

footer.description: bottom meta text of the card (post date, reading time, etc.)

link.description: navigate when the whole card is clicked (optional).

name: grid
description: Grid layout (arranges children into n columns).
semanticText: 그리드 격자 레이아웃 2열 3열 4열 columns 나열 배치 layout

name: metric
description: Single-metric card (label + value + delta arrow + icon). Place several inside a Grid for a KPI dashboard. With link, the whole card is clickable (CTA).
semanticText: 지표 수치 카드 KPI 대시보드 현재가 PER PBR 보유율 달성률 점수 변동 증감 상승 하락 메트릭 스탯 stat metric 통계

deltaType.description: up = red, down = blue, neutral = gray (optional)

link.description: navigate when the whole card is clicked (optional). When set, the card is wrapped in an anchor and the label text shows at the bottom.

label.description: CTA text at the bottom of the card (e.g. "See more")

name: timeline
description: Chronology / event timeline. Date + title + description laid out vertically.
semanticText: 타임라인 연대기 이벤트 이력 히스토리 history timeline 일정 단계 progress steps

href.description: URL to navigate to when the whole item is clicked (optional). When set, the item is wrapped in an anchor.

name: compare
description: A-vs-B comparison. Compares two targets attribute by attribute in a table form.
semanticText: 비교 대조 vs AB 선택 옵션 compare versus 장단점 대비

name: quiz
description: A single multiple-choice question. Stores question/answer/explanation separately and chooses how to render via view: exam (question sheet = question only) / answers (answer sheet = answer + explanation) / full (everything) / interactive (click → grade → explanation, default). Combine body boxes (boxes, grayscale exam style), ㄱㄴㄷ combined-answer statements (statements), figures/tables/graphs (figures = array of other components), and choices (①–⑧). Formulas in LaTeX $...$.
semanticText: 문제 객관식 시험 퀴즈 quiz 보기 선택지 정답 해설 수능 공무원 기출 사법고시 ①②③④⑤ ㄱㄴㄷ 합답형 시험지 해설지 exam

boxes.description: 0–N body boxes (grayscale exam style, markdown+LaTeX). Includes the 2-box case.

statements.description: ㄱㄴㄷ combined-answer statements (auto ㄱ/ㄴ/ㄷ/ㄹ labels). choices reference them as 'ㄱ,ㄴ' etc.

figures.description: visual stimuli like figures/tables/graphs — an array of other components (image/table/chart, etc.)

choices.description: 2–8 choices (markdown+LaTeX). The component auto-numbers ①②③, so don't put numbers in the choice text (text only).

answer.description: 0-based index of the correct choice (position in the choices array — first = 0, second = 1 …). Same as answerIndex.

answerIndex.description: 0-based index of the correct choice (same as answer — use only one of the two).

name: quiz_group
description: A set of questions sharing one passage (e.g. Korean SAT items 42–45). passage (shared text) + boxes/figures (shared stimulus) + questions[] (each: question/choices/answer/explanation/statements/figures). Same view as quiz (in interactive mode, answer all then grade at once).
semanticText: 지문 장문독해 세트 여러 문제 quiz group 수능 42 43 44 45 공통 지문 본문 한번에 채점 묶음

questions.description: array of items (each {question, choices(=options), answer or answerIndex (both 0-based correct index), explanation?, statements?, figures?})

name: sentence
description: English syntax-reading study card (구문독해 / 천일문 style): one sentence split into reading chunks with grammar roles (S/V/O/C/M) + per-chunk 직독직해 Korean gloss + sentence pattern (1~5형식) + grammar notes (준동사 etc.) + vocab flashcards. Interactive: tap a chunk to reveal its role + gloss (hidden by default = self-test); vocab meanings stay hidden (memorize) until tapped. Renders on a cream exam-paper background. Use for English study / 영어 해설 / 문장 분석.
semanticText: 영어 구문독해 천일문 문장분석 직독직해 끊어읽기 문장구조 성분 S V O C M 주어 동사 목적어 보어 수식어 5형식 문장형식 준동사 to부정사 동명사 분사 관계사 문법 해설 영어 단어 암기 어휘 vocabulary grammar sentence syntax reading

sentence.description: the full English sentence (fallback shown when tokens absent)

tokens.description: sentence split into reading chunks in order (끊어읽기). Each: text (English chunk), role (FUNCTION/성분만 — S/V/O/C/M/ADV = 주어/동사/목적어/보어/수식어/부사어, uppercase; also accepts mod/modifier/adverbial/subject/object etc.; omit for plain connecting words), form (optional — the chunk's grammatical FORM 형태: 명사구/명사절/부사구/부사절/형용사구/형용사절/to부정사구/동명사구/단어 등 단어·구·절 구분; rendered with role as 'S (명사구)'), gloss (this chunk's Korean meaning = 직독직해).

translation.description: natural full Korean translation (자연스러운 해석, markdown)

notes.description: grammar points (준동사·시제·관계사 등), each a markdown string

groups.description: 구·절 구조 끊어읽기 (선택) — 문장을 구/절 청크로 분해: label(구/절 종류, e.g. 주어부/동사부/목적어부/보어부/관계절/부사절/전치사구), text(그 청크의 영어 원문), depth(중첩 깊이 0=최상위·1=그 안의 절·2…), modifies(이 구가 수식하는 대상의 짧은 표기, e.g. 'The package' — 수식어구·관계절에만). 천일문식 구문 분해(수식 관계 포함).

vocab.description: vocab flashcards (단어 암기) for key/difficult words in the sentence — include 3–8 useful items. Each: word (English) + pos (part-of-speech abbreviation, e.g. n. v. a. adv. prep. conj.) + meaning (Korean). Rendered as memorize-then-reveal (tap to show). Always add these when analyzing an English sentence.

name: vocab
description: Vocabulary memorization study card for English exam prep (영단어 암기 — 토익·토플·수능·공무원). Evidence-based engine: active recall (meaning hidden → recall → tap to reveal), within-session Leitner adaptive spacing (wrong words resurface soon, mastered words drop out), bidirectional (영→한 recognition / 한→영 production = generation effect), elaborative reveal (example sentence with the word auto-highlighted + mnemonic 암기 고리 + etymology + synonyms/antonyms + optional image), 🔊 pronunciation via browser TTS, metacognitive self-grade (모름/애매/외움). Two views: flashcard (study engine) + list (quick review). Renders on cream exam-paper. Provide a words array; the component runs all study interaction with no backend. Cross-session spaced repetition / progress is the consuming app's job. Use for 단어 암기 / 단어장 / vocabulary study.
semanticText: 단어 암기 어휘 영단어 단어장 보카 vocabulary vocab 토익 토플 수능 공무원 텝스 지텔프 플래시카드 flashcard 암기법 인출연습 능동회상 라이트너 leitner 경선식 니모닉 mnemonic 발음 어원 etymology 유의어 반의어 영어 단어 외우기 spaced repetition 단어시험 word memorize

mode.description: 'flashcard' (default — recall + Leitner study engine) or 'list' (quick scannable review)

pos.description: part-of-speech abbrev — n. v. a. adv. prep. conj.

pronunciation.description: phonetic e.g. /juːˈbɪkwɪtəs/ (tap 🔊 also speaks it via browser TTS)

example.description: example sentence USING the word — shown on reveal with the word auto-highlighted (context learning)

exampleMeaning.description: Korean translation of the example sentence

mnemonic.description: memory hook — keyword/sound association (경선식식 소리연상) linking the word to its meaning. Strong for hard/abstract words; omit when it would be forced.

etymology.description: word roots / origin for deep encoding, e.g. 'ubi(어디든)+que → 어디에나'

image.description: optional image URL (dual coding — best for concrete words; NOT auto-fetched, the author/app provides it)

words.description: the word list. word + meaning required per item; pos / pronunciation / example(+exampleMeaning) / mnemonic / etymology / synonyms / antonyms / image are optional and each layer deepens encoding. Add a mnemonic + example for hard words. 5–20 words per card works well.

name: passage
description: Reading-comprehension STUDY card (독해 지문 능동 읽기) for English RC (토익·토플·수능·공무원). Active reading, NOT testing — use quiz_group for questions; passage is the reading-study companion. Features: in-context vocab (the component finds the words in the passage and makes them tap-to-reveal = 맥락 어휘 학습), per-paragraph main idea (요지 — hidden; learner predicts then taps to check, RC's #1 skill), overall thesis/key idea (주제, reveal), full Korean translation (해석, reveal). Renders on cream exam-paper. Evidence-based: vocab-in-context retention + main-idea identification + self-explanation (predict→check). Provide paragraphs (+ optional vocab/keyIdea/translation); the component runs all reading interaction with no backend. Use for 독해 / 지문 읽기 / reading study.
semanticText: 독해 지문 리딩 reading comprehension RC 영어독해 토익 토플 수능 공무원 텝스 지텔프 능동읽기 직독직해 해석 문단 요지 주제 main idea 단어 맥락 어휘 vocab passage 지문분석 문단요약 글읽기

mainIdea.description: this paragraph's main point (Korean) — hidden; learner predicts then taps to check (요지 파악)

paragraphs.description: the passage split into paragraphs (문단별). Each: text (English) + optional mainIdea (요지, tap-to-reveal). Split at natural paragraph breaks; 1 paragraph is fine for a short passage.

vocab.description: key/difficult words in the passage. The component finds each word in the paragraph text and makes that occurrence tap-to-reveal (맥락 어휘 — tap the word in the passage → meaning inline). word + meaning required, pos optional.

keyIdea.description: the passage's overall thesis / main idea (주제 — Korean, tap-to-reveal)

translation.description: full Korean translation of the passage (해석 — markdown, tap-to-reveal)

name: key_value
description: Lists **a single target's** attributes as label:value = a single-target table (one stock's specs, product info, financial metrics, etc.). Use columns 2/3 to place several pairs per row. To **compare multiple targets**, don't split into one key_value per target — use a table (targets = columns, attributes = rows). item.highlight = emphasize the value, item.href = navigate on row click.
semanticText: 키밸류 라벨 값 속성 정보 스펙 spec 정보 info 필드 단일 대상 한 종목 한 제품

key.description: item label. may be given as the synonym 'label' (one of the two is required).

label.description: synonym for key — giving label instead of key still shows it as the label.

href.description: URL to navigate to on item click (optional). When set, the row is wrapped in an anchor.

name: plan_card
description: A plan card that gets user approval *before* running a multi-step task — generated by the propose_plan tool (do NOT draw it directly with render). When 5+ tool calls are expected, propose first with propose_plan → suggest [run/revise/cancel]. Don't use it for completion or result summaries (use text/list/callout). steps is an array of objects [{title, description?}] — not an array of strings.
semanticText: 플랜 계획 로드맵 단계 step 체크리스트 todo 예정 로드맵 plan approve execute workflow 승인

tool.description: the main tool to use (for reference)

name: status_badge
description: Semantic status-badge set (positive/negative/neutral/warning/info). Several statuses in one row.
semanticText: 상태 뱃지 배지 태그 지표 정배열 과열 중립 positive negative warning info label tag chip

name: diagram
description: Mermaid diagram — flowchart / sequence / gantt / classDiagram / stateDiagram / mindmap / timeline / pie. Just set the text DSL and it renders. Fewer tokens + more stable than iframe + inline JS.
semanticText: 다이어그램 diagram mermaid flowchart sequence gantt class state mindmap pie 워크플로우 의사결정 트리

code.description: Mermaid DSL (e.g. "flowchart TD\n  A-->B"). Docs: https://mermaid.js.org/

name: math
description: KaTeX formula — a LaTeX string, inline or block. For math / statistics / finance formulas. Simpler than an iframe.
semanticText: 수식 math 수학 LaTeX katex 공식 수학식 통계 재무 적분 미분 시그마

block.description: true = block (centered, large), false = inline. default true

name: code
description: Code snippet — automatic highlight.js syntax highlighting. Accurate when language is set. Common in blogs, docs, READMEs.
semanticText: 코드 code 스니펫 snippet syntax highlight 프로그래밍 javascript python typescript SQL hljs

language.description: javascript / typescript / python / sql / json / bash / html / css, etc. (any hljs-supported language)

name: slideshow
description: Swiper image slideshow — horizontal slides + pagination + optional autoplay. For marketing, galleries, hero pages. (For a children-based card carousel, use render_carousel instead.)
semanticText: 슬라이드 slide 슬라이드쇼 slideshow swiper 갤러리 gallery 이미지 슬라이더 hero 마케팅

name: lottie
description: Lottie JSON animation — the lottie-web format from Adobe After Effects. Set a JSON URL and it plays automatically. For marketing, onboarding, illustrations.
semanticText: Lottie 애니메이션 animation 일러스트 illustration JSON 모션 motion graphic AE

src.description: Lottie JSON file URL (lottiefiles.com or self-hosted)

name: network
description: Cytoscape network graph — nodes + edges visualization. For relationship maps, org charts, data flows, system architecture.
semanticText: 네트워크 network 그래프 graph cytoscape 노드 node 간선 edge 관계도 조직도 의존성 시스템

color.description: node color (red / blue / green / orange / purple)

name: map
description: Map + markers + radius circles + legend. Visualize geo data like real-estate deals, weather, store locations. **Provider auto-switch**: Korean coordinates (lat 33–38.7, lon 124.5–132) with a Kakao JS key set → Kakao Map; **outside Korea → Leaflet+OSM** (free CDN; Kakao is precise for Korea only). Without a Kakao key, Korean coordinates also fall back to Leaflet. Coordinates must come only from a sysmod (kakao-map geocoding/search-keyword, etc.) — filling them from AI memory shows the wrong building/neighborhood.
semanticText: 지도 맵 map 마커 marker 위치 location 좌표 latlng 카카오 kakao leaflet osm 부동산 시세 날씨 매장 South Korea

markers.description: marker array. Korean coordinates → Kakao (precise, needs JS key), outside Korea → Leaflet+OSM (auto).

lat.description: latitude — use sysmod geocoding results only. Do not use AI memory.

lon.description: longitude — use sysmod geocoding results only. Do not use AI memory.

label.description: label above the marker. Use \n for multi-line. The marker shows even without one.

popup.description: popup text on marker click (some HTML allowed)

color.description: red / blue / green / orange / purple / yellow / gray or hex (#ef4444 etc.). default red.

type.description: category — real-estate / weather / poi, etc. (for UI grouping)

icon.description: marker icon. typhoon(🌀 current typhoon) / forecast (forecast typhoon, same swirl as current) / current(📍) / food restaurant·cafe·bakery·bar / finance & medical bank·atm·hospital·pharmacy·clinic·dental / education school·library·academy·university / shopping & transit convenience·mart·mall·subway·bus·train·parking·gas·airport / others hotel·park·gym·cinema·police·fire·post·gov·church·home·office. Default marker if unspecified.

size.description: marker size. legacy default = medium. typhoon area = large (emphasize current position).

windSpeed.description: [typhoon/forecast only] max wind speed m/s — auto KMA official intensity-level color + center number (1–5) (level1 weak ~17–24 green / level2 medium 25–32 blue / level3 strong 33–43 yellow / level4 very strong 44–53 orange / level5 super 54+ red / tropical depression <17 gray). Use ws from kma_weather typhoon-forecast. Takes priority over color when set.

lines.description: Polyline — connected line area. Typhoon track (current → forecast position chain), flight path, walking route, etc. Each line = an array of coordinates. Coordinates same as markers — sysmod results only.

points.description: line coordinate array [{lat, lon}, ...]. At least 2.

color.description: line color. default red. For a typhoon forecast track, slate (#64748b) is recommended (distinct from intensity colors). hex / color name.

circles.description: radius circle. For areas like a 1.5km radius around a station, a school district, a typhoon forecast probability radius, etc. Coordinates same as markers — sysmod results only.

radius.description: radius in m (e.g. 1500 = 1.5km). Take the value from sysmod results.

color.description: circle color (same format as markers' color). default blue.

cone.description: forecast cone (array — several can overlap). Naver-style typhoon = size cone (gale radius rad15, color #06b6d4 cyan) + probability cone (70% probability radius radPr, color #6366f1 indigo), two of them. Each cone = a smooth area widening along the track. A single cone is also fine.

points.description: track points + per-point radius (at least 2). current → forecast order. radius = radius m at each time. size cone = rad15 (gale radius km × 1000), probability cone = radPr (probability radius km × 1000).

color.description: cone fill/outline color. size cone = #06b6d4 (cyan), probability cone = #6366f1 (indigo).

legend.description: legend — top-right overlay. Use to explain what the marker colors mean.

center.description: map center coordinate. Defaults to the average of markers.

zoom.description: zoom level. Leaflet 1-18 / Kakao level 1-14. default 12

provider.description: auto (default — Korea→Kakao / outside Korea→Leaflet) / leaflet (outside Korea only, or forced) / kakao (force Korea)

name: form
description: Interactive input form backed by a sysmod. The user fills the fields and submits; the form calls `bindModule` with the field values ({field name: value}) and renders the returned data. Use to build an interactive frontend over a sysmod — e.g. a data lookup, a unit/currency converter, a search box. For purely client-side widgets with no backend, use an html app instead. Currently usable in the admin console; public published-page support is pending.
semanticText: form input submit interactive 입력 폼 제출 인터랙티브 도구 계산기 변환기 조회 검색 lookup 종목검색 모듈 호출 sysmod frontend 양식 버튼

bindModule.description: sysmod name to call on submit. Field values are passed as its input ({field name: value}). Without bindModule the submit button does nothing.

name.description: field key sent to the module

type.description: HTML input type (text | number | …), default text

inputs.description: input fields the user fills before submitting

name: button
description: A styled button/link. With href it navigates to a URL on click. variant = primary | secondary | outline. For an action that calls a backend, use a form instead.
semanticText: button link cta navigate action click 버튼 링크 이동 클릭 액션

href.description: URL to navigate to on click (optional)

name: slider
description: A range slider the user drags; shows the selected value live. Client-side display only — the value does not drive other components. For interactive calculation use an html app or a form.
semanticText: slider range drag value picker 슬라이더 범위 값 조절 선택

unit.description: suffix after the value, e.g. % or kg

name: tabs
description: Tabbed sections — click a tab to switch the shown content. Each tab has a label and its own child blocks. Good for organizing a lot of content compactly.
semanticText: tabs tabbed sections switch panel 탭 전환 구분 분류 섹션

children.description: blocks shown when this tab is active

name: accordion
description: Collapsible sections — click a title to expand/collapse its content. Great for FAQs, long content, and mobile. Each item has a title and its own child blocks.
semanticText: accordion collapse expand toggle faq 아코디언 접기 펼치기 토글 자주묻는질문 섹션

content.description: plain text/markdown shown when expanded (simplest case — e.g. an FAQ answer). Use this OR children, not both.

children.description: blocks shown when this item is expanded (use instead of content when you need rich blocks)

name: carousel
description: A slideshow the user swipes/clicks through, one child block per slide. Optionally auto-plays. Good for image galleries or stepping through content.
semanticText: carousel slideshow swipe gallery slides 캐러셀 슬라이드 갤러리 넘기기 슬라이드쇼
